text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking around the school
grounds with Inari One...

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What's with you constantly slacking off on
your training?!

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text:
...Shut up. It doesn't concern you, so leave me
alone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know those two. They were besties until a li'l
while ago. Lately they're constantly scrappin' like
cats and dogs.

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sick of your tone! If you're not gonna try,
then what are you doing here at Tracen
Academy?!

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text: I don't have to explain myself to you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh! Think I'd better step in.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hold up, you two! What's with all the
fightin'?

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text: Inari... please stay out of this.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No can do. Just look around ya! The storm you
two've been stirrin' up has got folks worried.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That said, we can't just leave this unfinished, eh?
How 'bout you let the great Inari deal with this
fight?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the day, as Umamusume, we settle
our disputes by runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't have said it better myself! There's no
way I'm gonna lose to someone who's always
skipping training!

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text: How about it? Don't tell me you're too scared!

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think, Trainer? Who's most likely to
come out the winner?
choice_data_list:
I'd have to go with the one who's kept up with
her training.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya think? Well, guess we just gotta watch and
see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Much to my surprise, however, it's the
Umamusume who was supposedly slacking off
who easily takes the win.

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... D-damn it!

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text: ...That's why I didn't want to race against you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what's with the long face? You're lookin'
pretty glum for someone who just won.

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text: ...I've just entered my race-ready phase.

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text:
I was happy at first. I was suddenly getting so
fast, I had no idea what was happening to me.

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text:
But... I gradually started feeling guilty each time I
ran.

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text:
It felt like I was moving forward alone, leaving her
behind.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Gotcha.
Well, your partner here poured her heart out to
ya. What's your response?

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text:
I knew that already! It was obvious you'd become
race-ready!

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I'd decided I was gonna catch up with
you... because I wanted to keep running with you!

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep running straight ahead, like I did
just now! I'll definitely catch up with you, so you
don't need to keep glancing back!

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I've acted so stupidly. I'll start training
properly again so I can get faster. I trust that
you'll catch up with me one day.

text_block_list.name: Ambitious Student
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... sniffle... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Gloomy Student
text_block_list.text: Inari... thank you for everything!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh. I swear, some folks have got no idea how
to have a proper fight!
choice_data_list:
Looks like that race busted open the guards
they put up, huh?

Looks like that race busted open the guards
they put up, huh?
You solved their problem in one fell swoop.
You solved their problem in one fell swoop.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh. I swear, some folks have got no idea how
to have a proper fight!
choice_data_list:
Looks like that race busted open the guards
they put up, huh?

Looks like that race busted open the guards
they put up, huh?
You solved their problem in one fell swoop.
You solved their problem in one fell swoop.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Exactly. Well, it woulda been a helluva lot easier if they opened up from the get-go.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But then, they woulda never gotten to buttin'
heads and experiencin' the essence of a fight!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And remember, if we ever go toe-to-toe, make sure to bring your A game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bold approach to solving problems—that's Inari
One for you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aw, quit it with the flattery. I only gave 'em a li'l
push in the right direction!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Alrighty. Seein' them run's got me all fired up!
Think I'll hit the track and run a lap too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Inari One dashes off with a bashful
look on her face.
